# Taran Rai

> AI/ML Engineer and Researcher specialising in computer vision, deep learning, LLMs, and applied AI.

## About

Taran Rai is an AI/ML Engineer and Researcher. His work spans computer vision, deep learning, large language models (LLMs), and applied AI/ML. He builds and validates algorithms for real-world deployment across multiple domains.

His research background is in computational pathology and health AI (both animal and human), including work with pharmaceutical companies on social media listening, startups on wearable tech and sensor-based systems through the vHive Animal Health Incubator, and guest lecturing on AI and neural networks at the University of Surrey.

He holds a PhD in AI/ML for digital pathology (University of Surrey), an MSc in Data Science (City, University of London), and a BA in Economics and Finance (Keele University).

## Selected Publications

- IPATH: A Large-Scale Pathology Image-Text Dataset from Instagram for Vision-Language Model Training. Journal of Imaging Informatics in Medicine, 2026. Mirhosseini S, Rai T, Diaz-Santana P, La Ragione R, Bacon N, Wells K.
- Comparative Analysis of Generative and Diffusion Models for Mitosis Synthesis in Histopathology Images. Cureus Journal of Computer Science, 3(1), 2026. Alkhadra RB, Diaz-Santana P, Rai T, Wells K.
- Echo chamber: uncovering the public views on ultrasounds via advanced social media listening. SPIE Medical Imaging, 2025. Rai T, Tarrant G, Wells K.
- The IPATH dataset: training CLIP models with histopathology-based image-caption pairs from Instagram. SPIE Medical Imaging, 2025. Mirhosseini S, Rai T, Diaz-Santana P, La Ragione R, Bacon N, Wells K.
- Evaluating diffusion model generated synthetic histopathology image data against authentic digital pathology images. SPIE Medical Imaging, 2024. Rai T, Gola C, Hernández M, et al.
- Keeping Pathologists in the Loop and an Adaptive F1-Score Threshold Method for Mitosis Detection in Canine Perivascular Wall Tumours. Cancers, 16(3), 644, 2024. Rai T, Morisi A, Bacci B, et al.
- The Terminator and veterinary medicine: can they meet outside the world of sci-fi? Vet Record, 2023. Rai T.
- Deep Learning for Necrosis and Mitosis Detection in Canine Soft Tissue Sarcoma Whole Slide Images. PhD Thesis, University of Surrey, 2023. Rai T.
- Digital Transformation of Cancer Care in the Era of Big Data, AI and Data-Driven Interventions. Seminars in Oncology Nursing, 2023. Papachristou N, et al.
- Detection of Necrosis in Digitised Whole-Slide Images for Better Grading of Canine Soft-Tissue Sarcomas Using Machine-Learning. Veterinary Sciences, 10(1), 45, 2023. Morisi A, Rai T, et al.
- Deep Learning for Necrosis Detection Using Canine Perivascular Wall Tumour Whole Slide Images. Scientific Reports, 12, 10634, 2022. Rai T, Morisi A, et al.

## Projects

- The LiverSWAT Project (https://liverswat.org): Liver health awareness and free FibroScan screening roadshows across the UK, created through NishkamSWAT charity.
- Model Takes (https://www.modeltakes.com): Blog covering AI/ML and technology.
